title: Spilotantha leathersii
taxonomy: Spilotantha leathersii is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Spilotantha, which is a small genus of legumes. The genus Spilotantha is further classified under the subfamily Faboideae, a subfamily that contains many species of peas, beans, and vetches. Spilotantha leathersii is native to Madagascar and is a relatively rare species. Classification of this plant is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis.
